category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an LR(1) parser generator for OCaml; official Menhir manual describes Menhir usage and grammar specifications.
display_name_sources: Official Menhir reference manual title uses “Menhir”; source_facts.name is menhir.
docs_sources: Official INRIA/Gallium Menhir reference manual is dedicated documentation; source_facts.homepage is the official project homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.inria.fr/fpottier/menhir, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OCaml and LR(1) parser generation; official manual documents grammar specifications and command-line usage; source_facts.executables lists menhir.
